title: Drunken Binchotan Grilled Croatian Mushroom Skewers
description: A festive fusion dish featuring tender mushrooms marinated in Croatian white wine and fermented bean paste, seared over high-heat binchotan charcoal.

ingredients.name: Ferment-Jang
ingredients.notes: Korean fermented soy sauce or liquid seasoning

instructions: Whisk together the white wine, ferment-jang, ras el hanout, olive oil, garlic, and maple syrup in a large bowl.
Toss the mushroom rounds in the marinade and let them sit for at least thirty minutes.
Prepare the binchotan charcoal in a chimney starter until it glows white-hot.
Thread the marinated mushrooms onto metal skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers onto the binchotan grill rack directly over the intense heat.
Grill the mushrooms for three minutes on each side until charred and tender.
Baste the mushrooms with the remaining marinade twice during the cooking process.
Remove the skewers from the heat and sprinkle with fresh chopped parsley.
Serve immediately while the mushrooms are hot and juicy.
